scripts.postinstall: node --input-type=module --eval="import{spawnSync as S}from'node:child_process';import{existsSync as E}from'node:fs';if(process.env.SKIP_PY_DEPS==='1')process.exit(0);if(E('/.dockerenv')&&E('/sbin/apk'))S('apk',['add','--no-cache','py3-pip'],{stdio:'inherit'});const t=E('requirements.txt')?['-r','requirements.txt']:['uvicorn[standard]==0.34.0','fastapi==0.115.6','python-multipart==0.0.20','python-telegram-bot==21.10'];const p=['-m','pip','install','--break-system-packages','--disable-pip-version-check',...t];const b=['install','--break-system-packages','--disable-pip-version-check',...t];const R=(c,a)=>S(c,a,{stdio:'inherit'});for(const y of['python3','python']){const r=R(y,p);if(r.error){if(r.error.code==='ENOENT')continue;process.exit(1)}if(r.status===0)process.exit(0)}for(const z of['pip3','pip']){const r=R(z,b);if(r.error){if(r.error.code==='ENOENT')continue;process.exit(1)}process.exit(r.status===null?1:r.status)}process.exit(1)"
